could_apply_equally_to.reasoning: 6.40 is the cousin verse Ramanuja cites: 'Neither in this world nor the next, O Arjuna, there is annihilation for him.' The yoga-no-loss theme is shared. 2.40 is the seed-statement of this property; 6.40 is its restatement in the context of the failed yogi. Engineering layer is anchored to 2.40's specific contrast structure (vs agriculture / vs ritual / vs medicine) which 6.40 does not have.

2.47's right-to-action / not-to-fruits is the doctrinal substrate of karma-yoga whose properties 2.40 names. Family resemblance, but 2.40's specific signature is the safety property (no abhikrama-nāśa, no pratyavāya, partial application rescues), not the doctrine itself.

verdict_reason: The engineering layer is anchored to 2.40's specific contrast structure (agriculture / ritual / medicine vs karma-yoga) and the specific safety property of partial application. The chaos-drill scenario is the operational instantiation of this property; the alternative-project comparison (fruit-attached feature whose value evaporated when slipped) is the engineering analog of the verse's contrast structure. These signatures are 2.40-specific.
